notes:
The app has a /search page that accepts a GET form with a 'q' parameter. Every non-empty query tested returns a Results page containing only '

No results found.

'. This is true both for anonymous users and authenticated users (session=ok cookie set after successful login with admin@example.com/password). An empty query q= returns the bare search form without a results section. No other product/catalog endpoints were found (/products, /catalog, /product/1, /item/1 all 404). The search appears to be entirely non-functional.

observations.value: GET /search?q=<any_term> always returns HTTP 200 with 'No results found.' regardless of the query string. Tested with: q=shirt, q=a, q=the, q=%, q=*, and q=shirt with an authenticated session cookie. No product results are ever returned, indicating the search feature is completely broken (returns no results for any query).
